name: Fireflies.ai Meeting Intelligence API
what_it_does: Fireflies.ai GraphQL API for AI-powered meeting transcription and conversation intelligence. Enables AI agents to retrieve meeting transcripts, access AI-generated summaries and action items, query meeting analytics, search conversation data, and integrate meeting intelligence into CRM and productivity workflows. Fireflies joins Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams calls to automatically transcribe and analyze meetings.
use_cases: Retrieving meeting transcripts and AI summaries from productivity agents
Extracting action items and follow-ups from meeting intelligence agents
Searching conversation data across meetings from knowledge management agents
Integrating Fireflies meeting data into CRM and project management workflow agents
not_for: Legal or compliance call recording without explicit participant consent
best_when: A sales or operations team using Fireflies wants AI agents to extract action items, sync meeting intelligence to CRM, and search conversation history for insights.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Meeting transcripts contain sensitive conversations. CRITICAL: Meeting recording requires explicit consent from all participants in many jurisdictions. Do not record without participant disclosure.

auth.notes: Fireflies uses API key authentication passed as Bearer token. API keys are account-scoped and provide access to all meetings in the account.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 800 minutes transcription storage, limited AI summaries
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro, Business, and Enterprise plans with unlimited transcription and advanced analytics
pricing.notes: API access on paid plans (Pro and above). Free plan for testing only.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Meeting transcripts contain highly sensitive business conversations — secure carefully
CONSENT: Recording meetings requires participant notification/consent in most jurisdictions
API is GraphQL only — no REST endpoints; agents must construct GraphQL queries
No public MCP server — GraphQL API integration required
API access requires paid plan (Pro+) — free plan is testing only
Transcripts may lag meeting completion by minutes to hours depending on meeting length
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Sensitive meeting conversation data. Consent requirements for recording vary by jurisdiction. SOC2, GDPR. API key auth — full account access.

security_score_components.security_notes: Sensitive meeting conversation data. GDPR, SOC2. Recording consent required. API key provides full account access.
